Quick Actions

Environment Variables
ai

Fireworks AI API key for Kimi K2.5 Turbo

ai

OpenAI API key (optional backup)

ai

Anthropic API key for Claude (optional)

API keys are stored securely and never exposed in client-side code. In production, these should be stored in Vercel Environment Variables or a secure vault.

Terminal Access

Full Ubuntu terminal access via browser. Execute commands in real-time.

AI Assistant

Powered by Fireworks AI with Kimi K2.5 Turbo. Ask anything!

Voice Control

Speak commands naturally. ElevenLabs integration for voice synthesis.

Vercel Ready

One-click deploy to Vercel. Configure tokens in Environment tab.
